programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Officers in Indiana chase a car full of women; in Illinois, police investigate a man who has allegedly taken dangerous drugs; in California, a suspected gang member barricades himself inside his car as police attempt to get him out.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: When officers in California attempt to pull over a vehicle suspected to be involved in a carjacking, things get out of hand when both driver and passenger attempt to flee; officers in Virginia use a dog to help detain a fleeing suspect; an officer in Arizona chases down a suspect through a parking lot.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: The K9 unit searches for someone accused of assault in Richland; officers in Jefferson County pursue a suspected stolen vehicle; in East Providence, shoplifters are caught with the goods; in Missoula, a suspected stolen car.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Mission, Texas, a house fire leads to a K9 rescue; in Jefferson, a driver takes officers on a dramatic chase; in Nye County, officers are called to wrangle wild horses.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a suspected stolen vehicle leads officers on a massive chase; in Richland, officers assist a stranded motorist; they are interrupted by a report of an alleged home invasion.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Nye County, officers pursue an ATV in a bumpy chase; in East Providence, a motorist who was allegedly robbed decides to take justice into his own hands; in Lawrence, officers respond to a report of a suspected aggressive pig on the loose.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Lawrence, officers race to a call of suspected shots fired; Jefferson officers discuss pursuit tactics after an intense chase; in Missoula, a routine stop reveals a car covered in blood.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In East Providence, police respond to reports of an alleged intruder inside a home; in Missoula, a traffic stop reveals that both passengers are wanted on outstanding warrants.

programme.desc: A storm threatens to close the port. Border Force officers discover women being smuggled into the country. And there's something suspicious in the back of a van.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A ten-week-old baby has choked on his milk. Tony has a flesh-eating leg infection. And is the bruising on Gerald's leg more serious than he realises.

programme.title: How to Trick Your Way Onto
programme.desc: the Property Ladder: Satirist Oobah Butler deploys leftfield stunts to get some first-time buyers a home, asking: how did it come to this? And is it legal to hypnotise an estate agent?

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: The series that goes behind the scenes at world-leading cancer hospital the Royal Marsden. Aspiring midwife Anthea has a difficult tumour that could lead to arm amputation.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits South Philadelphia, where struggling family-run restaurant Chiarella's is pushing owners Tommy and Dina DeFino's marriage to the brink.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire and Yorkshire, there's a one-man comedy show, a posh take on some Yorkshire classics, and a big surprise for one guest.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: American bulldog 'Buddy the clown' throws his weight around with Katie and James. Terrier Tiddles has a makeover. And does Jacks the Jack Russell have small dog syndrome.

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks super-speedy smoked salmon pasta, a loaded beef burger with sweet red peppers, pickles and mustard, and gorgeously soft and sticky toffee apple buns.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Tensions rise when Ste takes part in Leah's podcast, and Jenson protects Gemma. Meanwhile, a dinner party leads to soul-searching as the consequences of the past crash into the present..

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Nisha Katona in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A performance by children's entertainer Nanny Gee in honour of Frederick's second birthday helps to shed some light on Frasier's romantic past.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A Diminished Rebecca with a Suspended Cliff: Rebecca hires Woody's pianist cousin to play at the bar - and he promptly falls in love with her.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca insists she can run the bar while Sam plays poker, but then she forgets to renew the alcohol licence.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert foolishly decides to tell his girlfriend Amy that he met up with his ex-wife. Amy turns to Debra for support, but Debra accidentally tells her about Stefania..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Ray accidentally kills Ally's hamster, Debra insists that the family hold a pet funeral.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray has to face up to failure for once, while Robert is promoted to lieutenant, causing the brothers to fall out.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles decide to take Martin out for a tip-top meal but end up at his favourite restaurant - the Timber Mill House of Beef.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier becomes the target of a hate campaign organised by a local newspaper columnist, Martin and Daphne encourage him to fight back.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin meets a woman while tinkering with his telescope. Frasier encourages the romance, but Martin suddenly gets cold feet.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Shetland: Scotland's Wondrous Isles
programme.desc: On the second largest island in Shetland, Yell, locals gear up for their annual show. Veg grower John hopes to win the battle of the heavyweights with his huge pumpkin.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders

programme.title: Police Interceptors
